SEARCH
Package ai.alumnium.tool

Interface BaseTool

All Known Implementing Classes:
ClickTool, PressKeyTool, TypeTool
public sealed interface BaseTool permits ClickTool, PressKeyTool, TypeTool
Sealed root of the tool hierarchy. Each permitted subtype is a Java record describing one action the server can ask the driver to perform.

The static executeToolCall(Map, Map, BaseDriver) helper deserialises a {"name": "...", "args": {...}} payload into the appropriate record using Jackson and invokes it against the driver.

  • Method Details

    • invoke

      void invoke(BaseDriver driver)
      Run the tool against the given driver.

    • executeToolCall

      static String executeToolCall(Map<String,Object> toolCall, Map<String,Class<? extends BaseTool>> tools, BaseDriver driver)
      Instantiate a tool from its JSON representation and execute it. Returns the ToolName(arg=value, ...) string representation, matching the Python BaseTool.execute_tool_call contract.
